cases.prompt_body: Threshold view into a NASA shuttle launch decision room, doorframe, tile floor, and console-lined interior remain canonical, one lone standing engineer at the doorway holds a closed blank binder while two seated decision-makers remain deeper inside at a low table, one empty chair sits centered between the doorway and the table turned away from the standing figure, all monitors dark or blank, no signage, off-white walls, slate-blue consoles, restrained fluorescent light

Oblique conference-table corner inside a shuttle launch decision room, a compact seated management pair occupies the bright center of the table while one isolated engineer stands at the dim edge with a single closed folder, one speakerphone and one blank presentation board sit on the seated side only, the engineer's place at the table is left visibly empty, no readable papers, no labels, pale gray, muted teal, charcoal, restrained overhead light

Glass-partition firing-room threshold at night, slanted window structure and control consoles remain canonical, one headset-wearing engineer stands alone in the foreground shadow outside the discussion zone while a small seated decision cluster remains inside beyond the glass, one large wall panel behind them is blank and unlit and a single amber call light glows above the group, no signage, no readable screens, pale gray, muted blue, restrained institutional tension
